name: synkromium
description: Keep your Chromium browser settings and extensions in sync across all your devices, privately and automatically.

scripts.copy:assets: mkdir -p dist/ui/renderer && cp src/ui/renderer/index.html dist/ui/renderer/ && cp src/ui/renderer/styles.css dist/ui/renderer/
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer && npm run copy:assets
